title: VS Battles Wiki

|-|Visitors= [[File:LGBT VSBW.png|320px|right]]

'''Welcome!'''

The {{SITENAME}} is the world's most comprehensive and popular index of statistics and powers for characters from all of popular fiction. Here is a list of pages that are useful to become acquainted with: *[[:Category:Characters|Character Profiles]] *[[:Category:Verses|Fictional Franchises]] *[[:Category:Important|Important Pages]] *[[:Category:Terms|Terms]] *[[:Category:Powers and Abilities|Powers and Abilities]] *[[Site Disclaimer|Disclaimer]] {{HeadingA|Media}}

{| style="display: none;" | [[File:GokuSet 2.png|link=:Category:Anime]] | [[File:Harryset 2.png|link=:Category:Book Verses]] |- | [[File:BenSet 2.png|link=:Category:Cartoons]] | [[File:Superset 2.png|link=:Category:Comic Books]] |- | [[File:Marioset 2.png|link=:Category:Games]] | [[File:RvBSet 2.png|link=:Category:Internet]] |- | [[File:Haruhiset 2.png|link=:Category:Light Novels]] | [[File:Luffyset 2.png|link=:Category:Manga]] |- | [[File:Vaderset 2.png|link=:Category:Movies]] | [[File:GorillazSet 2.png|link=:Category:Music]] |- | [[File:TelevisionTARDISpink.png|link=:Category:TV Series]] | [[File:Sabsab 2.png|link=:Category:Visual Novel Verses]] |} {{HeadingA|Information}} Here are some important pages to read in order to understand our system: *[[Tiering System]] *[[Tiering System FAQ]] *[[Set Theory Explanation Page]] *[[Universe]] *[[Higher-Dimensional Existence]] *[[Beyond-Dimensional Existence]] *[[Reality-Fiction Transcendence]] *[[Omnipotence]] {{HeadingA|Scaling}} In order to more easily overview the statistics scaling structures for most of our character profile pages, please visit the "Calculations" sections in their respective associated [[:Category:Verses|verse pages]]. |-|Members= {{HeadingA|Wiki Rules}} It is greatly appreciated if you help out by reporting rule violations in [[vsforum:threads/107529|this thread]], and if it does not gain attention, report the incident directly to the [[VS Battles Staff|{{SITENAME}} staff]]. Also, please note that violating a rule in another's turn does not allow exemption, for example: breaking a rule because "the other member broke the rules as well" is not an acceptable excuse. *[[Site Rules]] *[[Editing Rules]] *[[Discussion Rules]] *[[Versus Thread Rules]] Valid reasons for contributions and power-scaling should be displayed, and if possible, calculation links for feats. Help to fix grammar or page structure errors, and to reword crude language is highly appreciated. Take note that, due to considerable problems with trolls and vandals, it is automatically required that our members wait for 4 days after first creating an account before they are able to edit, and they must also have a confirmed email address. For the same reason, regular members are not able to replace existing images with new ones that share the same title, and should preferably take care to name them as something that is not generic to be able to [[Special:Upload|upload them]]. Absolutely do not click on any random links from suspicious users. You could potentially access content that contains dangerous malware, or tracks your IP address and location. If you are uncertain, please use [https://getlinkinfo.com/ this page] to verify that the links are not dangerous. Also, make sure to read [[w:Terms of Use|Fandom's terms of use]]. Their staff members are extremely vigilant at enforcing them. We do have a content filter in place that prevents our members from posting various ethnic, sexist, and religious slur words, but please still try to be extremely careful to avoid them (including misspelled versions, with separated letters, or even by quoting somebody else) or the Fandom staff might globally block you for very long periods of time. Thank you for your cooperation, and your help with improving this wiki. {{HeadingA|Editing Instructions}} *[[Standard Format for Character Profiles]] *[[Standard Format for Verse Pages]] *[[Standard Format for Item Profiles]] *[[Standard Format for Vehicle Profiles]] *[[Standard Format for Civilization Profiles]] *[[Standard Format for Powers and Abilities]] *[[Standard Format for Categories]] *[[Common Editing Mistakes]] *[[References]] {{HeadingA|Help Section}} For general discussions, and match-ups of various sorts, you can visit [[vsforum:|the forums]]. If you need help from the staff, you can use the following options: *For profile content revision requests, go to [[vsforum:forums/11|this board]], and specify the series and topic within the title (for example: "One Piece: Luffy Downgrade"), but make sure to first check if a certain topic has been handled previously. Since the search function does not work properly, you can visit the profile page of a concerned specific character, or verse/franchise/fiction, and check the "See more discussions" link at the bottom right corner of the page for tagged related topics. This usually works more easily. *If a specific important feat for a notable franchise needs to be calculated to properly scale one, or preferably several, characters, you can ask about it [[vsforum:threads/107525|here]], and read instructions for how to properly do so [[Calculation Evaluation and Request Instructions|here]]. But our staff has limited time and resources, so strictly do so if the calculation is very important. Also, please read the following pages regarding how to do more straightforward calculations on your own before imposing on our staff members: **[[Calculation Guide]] **[[Calculations]] **[[Calculations Introduction and References]] **[[Aim Dodging]] **[[Black Hole Feats in Fiction]] **[[Calc Stacking]] **[[Celestial Body Feats]] **[[Cinematic Time]] **[[Cloud Calculations]] **[[Creation Feats]] **[[Earthquake Calculations]] **[[Environmental Destruction]] **[[Explosion Speed Calculations]] **[[Explosion Yield Calculations]] **[[Gravitational Binding Energy]] **[[Inverse Square Law]] **[[Kinetic Energy feats]] **[[Large Size Calculations]] **[[Laser/Light Beam Dodging Feats]] **[[Lightning Feats]] **[[Mass-energy conversion feats]] **[[Mountain and Island Level Requirements]] **[[Multipliers]] **[[Planet Curvature Scaling]] **[[Projectile Dodging Feats]] **[[References for Common Feats]] **[[Storm Calculations]] *You can also read through the [[References for Common Feats]] page, if it is a generic feat that may not need to be calculated. *To post your own calculations, you are required to go to your personal message wall, select the "Blog" folder, and then click the "Create blog post" button. *If you have questions regarding methods, real life data, or need other important input for calculating feats from members of this community, please [[vsforum:threads/123478|click here]]. *You should always ask our calculation group members to check if any new important calculations are acceptable to use for scaling character statistics, whether by commenting in content revision threads that link to calculations hosted by external sites, or in the blog posts mentioned above. This can be done in the official [[vsforum:threads/107523|Calculations Evaluations]] thread. *Other official policy pages: **[[Canon]] **[[Character-Induced Stupidity]] **[[Creation Feats]] **[[Crossovers]] **[[Environmental Destruction]] **[[Fallacies]] **[[Fighting Games Powerscaling Standards]] **[[Game Mechanics]] **[[Hax]] **[[Hyperbole]] **[[Inconsistencies]] **[[The Kardashev Scale]] **[[Power-scaling Rules for Marvel and DC Comics|Marvel and DC Comics Powerscaling Standards]] **[[Metaphysical Aspects]] **[[Outliers]] **[[Plot-Induced Stupidity]] **[[Power Inheritance Standards]] **[[Reality Equalization]] **[[Stabilization Feats]] **[[Standard Battle Assumptions]] **[[Universal Energy Systems]] *If you find pages that are severely lacking in proper statistics justifications, have poor formatting, are stubs that are almost empty of content, or are otherwise unacceptable by our wiki's standards, you can visit [[vsforum:threads/107528|this forum thread]] to ask if they should be deleted. *If you find locked pages that simply need to have their grammar and structures improved, you can [[vsforum:threads/107521|go here]] to ask for help. *To request that a certain locked profile image is replaced, or that a new one is added, visit [[vsforum:threads/107526|this thread]]. *If you need to make a render of a profile image, visit [[vsforum:threads/107527|this thread]], or read [[Guide to Basic Rendering|this page]] to learn how to do so yourself. *To request that the wiki staff add conclusive match-up thread results to locked profile pages, visit [[vsforum:threads/107532|this thread]]. *If you want to remove versus threads, that are outdated or stomp matches, from profiles that are administrator-protected, visit [[vsforum:threads/107533|this thread]]. *To suggest general wiki improvements, visit [[vsforum:threads/107530|this thread]]. *To request translations of small text segments that are important for improving the accuracy of our wiki profiles, visit [[vsforum:threads/107531|this forum thread]]. If you are willing to help out with translations, please write down your username in [[Multilingual Members List|this page]]. *For important staff requests that are not covered by the above specialized topics or forums, you can visit [[vsforum:threads/107534|this thread]]. *You can also [[VS Battles Staff|directly contact the managing staff]], but please avoid disturbing us unless it concerns something reasonably important. *If you are extremely knowledgeable about a certain fictional franchise, and are willing to help out with resolving forum threads concerning it, you can write down your username in [[Knowledgeable Members List (Verses)|this list]]. *If you are knowledgeable about the terminology, standards, and concepts that we use here in this wiki, it is appreciated if you write down your username in [[Knowledgeable Members List (Wiki Terminology)|this list]] as well. *You can visit the [[VS Battles Glossary]] page, to overview terms that are recurrently used within this wiki. {{HeadingA|Notice: Help Wanted}} [[VS Battles Staff|We]] are looking for new members to be a part of our staff, and would appreciate help from our community with finding competent and reliable people. Feel free to '''[[vsforum:threads/134015|contact us]]''' with any potential member suggestions (including yourself) that you have in mind. {{HeadingA|New Members}} Please read our [[Welcome Message]] page, which summarises the most important instructions for new editors in this wiki. {{HeadingA|Forum}} Given Fandom's system update to the Unified Community Platform, our old internal forums have been shut down. As such, we have moved to a new external forum hosted at [[vsforum:|https://vsbattles.com/]]. We have an automated signup system for our wiki members, with a procedure that must be exactly followed in order to register. For instructions regarding how to sign up or sign in to our new forum, [[Information about our external forum|please click here]]. {{MainPage/Statistics}} {{HeadingA|Partner Wikis}} [[File:Wiki-wordmark JBW.png|link=w:c:joke-battles:Joke Battles Wikia]] [[File:Wiki-wordmark OCFCVSB.png|link=w:c:fcoc-vs-battles:FC/OC VS Battles Wiki]] {{HeadingA|Charity Donations}} [[File:Save The Children.png|600px|link=https://www.savethechildren.net]] Clicking on the image above links to '''[https://www.savethechildren.net Save the Children]''', to help children who are starving, suffering from war, natural disasters, or are living in extreme poverty. [[File:Animal Charity Advertisement Image.png|600px|link=https://animalcharityevaluators.org/donate/]] You can also click on the above image to donate money to '''[https://animalcharityevaluators.org/donate/ Animal Charity Evaluators]'''. ACE evaluates and donates to animal charities based on their effectiveness, impact, and methods. For further information regarding how to find the most reliable and efficient charity organisations, '''[[Charity Evaluators|please click here]]'''. This includes information regarding how the staff members of other wikis can also add advertisements to one or two very reliable charities of their choice to the front pages of their respective wikis.
